subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of God! What thou didst write was specially read and considered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید مخصوص مطالعه رفت و ملاحظه گشت سبب
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
